violations.description: Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooked potentially hazardous food was not cooled properly from 140F to 70F or below within two hours. Employee stated bacon was cooked between 4-6am, container of bacon temped at over 80 degrees 3 hours after being cooked.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single-use food containers on top of the food prep area need to be inverted to prevent dust and debris from landing on the food contact surface.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors behind the fryers and in the dry storage need to be cleaned more thoroughly.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food items stored on floor in exterior walk in freezer.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Commercial convection ovens used for cooking bacon not located under hood system.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in coolers & freezers need cleaning. Fryers need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Lower shelving, equipment sides & tops, & area around fryers needs cleaning.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Operate 3 tub sink as follows... 1) Hot Soapy Water 2) Clear Water Rinse 3) Sanitizing Rinse 4) Air Dry All Utensils Ensure clear water rinse step is being accomplished prior to sanitizing rinse.--Wash water and/or rinse water for three compartment sink was not clean. Sanitizing rinse water at 3 compartment sink cloudy and has soap bubbles floating on top. Ensure clear water rinse step is being accomplished before sanitizing rinse step.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Hand sink near ice cream machine not provided with hand soap.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Hand sink near ice cream machine not provided with paper towels.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning in facility. Debris under shelving units, sinks, line cooking equipment, and cold hold units. Excessive grease build-up around fryers. Air vent and ceiling tiles need cleaning.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. Light shield missing above BOH 3 tub sink & bun storage.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
